caption: A man with a short haircut, wearing a white short-sleeved collared shirt and dark trousers with a black backpack, records himself with a smartphone in a large football stadium. The scenes transition from close-up shots of his face to wide shots showing him standing on the green pitch in front of empty red stadium seating and a goal post. The Real Madrid club crest is visible in the upper corners of the frames. Yellow and white subtitles appear on the screen; the first sequence reads, "¡Vamos a darlo todo! We'll give it our all!" and "por conseguir los tres puntos. we got the three-points." Later, the text changes to "¡Hala Madrid! Hala Madrid!". The man holds the phone up to capture himself, speaking toward the camera while standing on the field.
